title: Set start date when a subitem is created
excerpt: Hi! My workflow starts by creating an item, updating the progress status, and then creating subitems under the main item. Is there a way to set the start date or due date to today?

posts.author: Carla22 (Carla22)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! My workflow starts by creating an item, updating the progress status, and then creating subitems under the main item. Is there a way to set the start date or due date to today?

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Carla22
You could just use a creation log field and call it Start date and change the settings on the field to just date
That way every time you create a subitem it will set the date to today as it uses the date you created the subitem

Another way is to use an automation, when you change the status on the parent item set the subitem date to current date + 0 days

Screenshot 2022-11-23 at 07.41.431130×331 21.9 KB

Hope this provides what you need
many thanks in advance
Dan

posts.author: Carla22 (Carla22)
posts.cookedHtml: It worked! Thank you so much for your help!
